violations.text: The condensate from the ice machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The food prep sink is equipped with an air break. An air gap is required. PIC informed and state guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. bar dumpsink (leaking from discharge pipe) 2. kitchen handsink (leaking from discharge pipe) 3. kitchen food prep sink (leaking onto floor and draining slowly) Equipment was taken out of service during time of inspection. Equipment must be properly adjusted prior to use. Equipment and systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
